title: limeum induratum
intro: Limeum induratum, also known as Indian snakeroot, is a plant species that belongs to the Pedaliaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Limeum induratum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Limeum induratum can be prepared into various herbal formulations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
